title: Implement create-score-code Tactus procedure
description:
Implements story `plx-bcf813` (Create Score code from guidelines via procedure).

Scope:
- Tactus procedure YAML/code for Observe/Orient/Decide/Approval/Act flow
- Score discovery + missing-code targeting
- Per-score drafting/reset loop and prediction-run validation
- Human approval gate + dry-run mode
- Programmatic score update act phase
- Tests for key behavior and dry-run no-write guarantees

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented initial procedure for story `plx-bcf813`:

- Added `plexus/procedures/score_code_create.yaml` (Tactus).
- Flow implemented: Observe -> Orient -> Decide -> Draft Code -> Approval -> Act.
- Observe builds scorecard context pack with paging and scorecard-detail instructions.
- Orient resolves existing target scorecard; not-found exits with explicit error.
- Decide inspects scorecard scores, calls `plexus_score_info`, and targets only missing-code scores.
- Per-score drafting loop uses `code_drafter.reset()` and prediction validation via `plexus_predict` (yaml_path + validation item).
- Human approval gate included before writes.
- Act stage applies `plexus_score_update` for each planned score.
- Added README section for `score_code_create.yaml`.

Validation run:
- YAML parse/load check passed for new procedure file.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Added tests for procedure definitions and re-ran targeted suites.

New tests:
- `plexus/procedures/test_procedure_definitions.py`
  - validates `scorecard_create.yaml` is valid Tactus template
  - validates `score_code_create.yaml` is valid Tactus template
  - checks required agents/tool wiring for `score_code_create`

Verification run:
- `pytest -q MCP/tools/score/guidelines_test.py MCP/tools/scorecard/scorecards_test.py plexus/cli/procedure/lua_dsl/tests/test_agent_primitives.py plexus/procedures/test_procedure_definitions.py`
- Result: `40 passed`.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Adding executable tests for procedure routing/validation (not just YAML shape): execute_procedure Tactus routing tests + template validation tests for class/code/workflow rules.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Added procedure-focused test code (beyond YAML shape checks):

- `plexus/cli/procedure/test_tactus_procedure_routing.py`
  - verifies `execute_procedure` routes `scorecard_create.yaml` to Tactus and passes `code` payload
  - verifies `execute_procedure` routes `score_code_create.yaml` to Tactus and passes `code` payload
  - verifies Tactus wrapper without `code` fails with explicit error

- `plexus/cli/procedure/test_tactus_template_validation.py`
  - validates both procedure YAMLs pass `_validate_yaml_template`
  - asserts Tactus+workflow is rejected
  - asserts `class: LuaDSL` is rejected

Re-ran targeted suites:
`pytest -q plexus/cli/procedure/test_tactus_procedure_routing.py plexus/cli/procedure/test_tactus_template_validation.py plexus/procedures/test_procedure_definitions.py MCP/tools/score/guidelines_test.py MCP/tools/scorecard/scorecards_test.py plexus/cli/procedure/lua_dsl/tests/test_agent_primitives.py`

Result: `47 passed`.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Adding explicit behavior specs per Tactus BDD guidance: feature/spec files for scorecard_create and score_code_create acceptance behavior.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Corrected approach: removed external Python-style Gherkin spec files and embedded Tactus-native  blocks directly inside procedure  for  and , each wrapped in  with explicit input/output schemas. Re-ran targeted tests: 47 passed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Correction applied:
- Removed external Python-style Gherkin files for procedure specs.
- Embedded Tactus-native Specification blocks directly inside procedure code for:
  - plexus/procedures/scorecard_create.yaml
  - plexus/procedures/score_code_create.yaml
- Wrapped each procedure code body in Procedure { input, output, function } so specs are part of Tactus definitions.
- Targeted test run passed: 47 passed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Ran embedded Tactus specifications from procedure code using Tactus test runner API (CLI is currently broken in this environment due Typer flag parsing).

Method:
- Extracted each YAML `code:` block to temp `.tac` files
- Parsed inline `Specification([[ ... ]])` from each
- Executed with `tactus.testing.test_runner.TactusTestRunner(..., mocked=True)`

Results:
- `scorecard_create.yaml`: 3 scenarios, 3 passed, 0 failed
- `score_code_create.yaml`: 3 scenarios, 3 passed, 0 failed

Note:
- Specs are now embedded in Tactus code, not external Python feature files.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Unblocked scope expanded per user: fixing ../Tactus CLI failure is now in scope. Investigating and patching Tactus, then re-running embedded-spec tests through CLI.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Fixed Tactus CLI breakage and ran embedded Tactus specs via CLI.

Root issue observed:
- `tactus --version` and `tactus test ...` crashed with Click/Typer option parsing error (`Secondary flag is not valid for non-boolean flag`).

Fixes applied:
1) Updated Tactus dependency constraints in `../Tactus/pyproject.toml`:
   - `typer>=0.17,<0.18` (runtime + dev extras)
2) Reinstalled editable Tactus package (`pip install -e .`)
3) Updated procedure code to Tactus callable agent syntax (replaced deprecated `.turn()` with callable form) so CLI validation passes.

Verification:
- `tactus --version` now works (`0.44.1`).
- Ran embedded spec tests from procedure code via CLI:
  - `tactus test /tmp/scorecard_create.tac --mock` -> 3 passed
  - `tactus test /tmp/score_code_create.tac --mock` -> 3 passed
- Re-ran Plexus targeted tests: `47 passed`.

Notes:
- Specs are embedded in Tactus code (`Specification([[ ... ]])`) inside both procedure YAML code blocks.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation of procedure spec runner (service + CLI + MCP + tests) per approved plan. Default mode: mock; integration optional.
